translations.features.title: What IDEM {$START_TAG_SPAN}Generates{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN}{$LINE_BREAK} For You
translations.features.description: From your idea, IDEM creates everything you need to launch your business. No technical skills required.
translations.features.feature1.title: Logo & Brand Identity
translations.features.feature1.description: Professional logo, color palette, typography, and complete brand guidelines.
translations.features.feature2.title: Complete Business Plan
translations.features.feature2.description: Market analysis, financial projections, strategy, and investor-ready documentation.
translations.features.feature3.title: Legal Documents
translations.features.feature3.description: Terms of service, privacy policy, contracts, and all legal documents you need.
translations.features.feature4.title: Full-Stack Web Application
translations.features.feature4.description: Complete web app with frontend, backend, database, and authentication.
translations.features.feature5.title: Automatic Deployment
translations.features.feature5.description: Your app deployed to the cloud with custom domain. Live in minutes, not weeks.
translations.features.feature6.title: Complete Documentation
translations.features.feature6.description: UML diagrams, API documentation, architecture guides, and technical specifications.
translations.features.bottomText: Everything generated by 200+ specialized AI agents. Open source and made in Cameroon.
